pages.title: Custom Content Pipeline
pages.summary: Internal notes for loading fork-specific SQL and quest assets.
pages.markdown:
# Custom Content Pipeline

## Import Order

1. Load base data.
2. Apply custom SQL patches.
3. Rebuild shared memory.

## Quest Notes

Use local quest API extensions for fork-only methods and events.

## Schema Notes

Document any custom columns added to stock tables so Oracle can surface them during schema lookups.

pages.title: Quest Conventions
pages.summary: Team conventions for writing custom Perl and Lua quest scripts.
pages.markdown:
# Quest Conventions

## Perl

Use `quest::debug` in starter handlers when introducing a new custom event.

## Lua

Use `eq.debug` in starter handlers and keep the first argument descriptive.

## Extensions

If a method or event only exists in your fork, add it as a quest API extension before relying on it in prompts.
